m2614.description: Gate 1 detection: daily scan for m2614 indices frozen longer than threshold with no active retirement request. Creates audit record + Kibana Case per candidate.

script.source: def ilmData = ctx.payload['ilm']; return ilmData != null && ilmData.get('indices') != null && ilmData.get('indices').size() > 0;

def ilmData = ctx.payload['ilm'].get('indices'); if (ilmData == null) return ['candidates': [], 'candidate_count': 0, 'summary_text': 'No ILM data available.']; Set existingSet = new HashSet(); def aggResult = ctx.payload['existing_requests']; if (aggResult != null && aggResult['aggregations'] != null && aggResult['aggregations']['by_index'] != null) { def buckets = aggResult['aggregations']['by_index']['buckets']; if (buckets != null) { for (def b : buckets) { existingSet.add(b['key']); } } } long nowMs = ctx.execution_time.millis; long thresholdMs = (long)(ctx.metadata['frozen_threshold_days']) * 86400000L; def candidates = []; for (def entry : ilmData.entrySet()) { String indexName = entry.getKey(); def state = entry.getValue(); if (!indexName.contains('m2614')) continue; if (!'frozen'.equals(state['phase'])) continue; if (existingSet.contains(indexName)) continue; def phaseMs = state['phase_time_millis']; if (phaseMs == null) continue; long frozenAgeMs = nowMs - (long)(phaseMs); if (frozenAgeMs < thresholdMs) continue; int ageDays = (int)(frozenAgeMs / 86400000L); String policy = state['policy'] != null ? state['policy'].toString() : 'unknown'; String requestId = indexName + '-gate1'; candidates.add(['_id': requestId, '@timestamp': ctx.execution_time, 'request_id': requestId, 'index_name': indexName, 'state': 'pending_gate1', 'created_at': ctx.execution_time, 'updated_at': ctx.execution_time, 'phase_age_days': ageDays, 'ilm_policy': policy, 'ilm_phase': 'frozen', 'watcher_id': ctx.metadata['watcher_id']]); } StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); for (def c : candidates) { sb.append('- ').append(c['index_name']).append(' (frozen ').append(c['phase_age_days']).append('d, policy: ').append(c['ilm_policy']).append(') '); } return ['candidates': candidates, 'candidate_count': candidates.size(), 'summary_text': sb.length() > 0 ? sb.toString() : 'No new retirement candidates.'];

webhook.body: {"title": "M-26-14 Data Retirement - Gate 1 Approval Required ({{ctx.payload.candidate_count}} index(es))", "description": "The following M-26-14 managed indices have been frozen beyond the retention threshold and are candidates for data retirement. Review and approve each before the deletion lifecycle begins. Candidates: {{ctx.payload.summary_text}} To approve Gate 1: index a document to m2614-retirement-requests with {state: approved_gate1, index_name: <name>, gate1_approved_by: <your-username>}. To cancel: index with {state: cancelled}.", "tags": ["m2614", "data-retirement", "gate1", "compliance"], "connector": {"id": "none", "name": "none", "type": ".none", "fields": null}, "settings": {"syncAlerts": false}, "severity": "medium", "owner": "securitySolution"}
